name: Vitabiotics SuperDog Canine Supplement Health and Vitality - 30 Chewable Tablets
description: SuperDog Health & Vitality - a delicious braised beef flavour supplement chew tablet that your dog will love. With L-Carnitine and L-Lysine to support weight management, heart health and a good metabolism. This supplement is meant to compliment your dog's existing diet and is not a treatment, nor medication. Suitable for all size and breed of dog. Not suitable for puppies less than 12 months of age. No artificial colours No preservatives SuperDog is not tested on animals The key to a healthy, happy dog is the same for humans! Love, care and attention, plenty of exercise and a healthy balanced diet provides optimum micronutrient intake. SuperDog Health & Vitality contains a comprehensive blend of essential nutrients at optimum levels to support healthy dogs. This supplement has been scientifically formulated by canine health experts to provide advanced nutritional support for your dog. The formula contains 25 vital nutrients to help safeguard your dog's diet, whatever their size or breed. Supports Health & Immunity - Antioxidant vitamins A, C, D and E to help protect against the harmful effect of free radicals, plus essential minerals zinc and selenium to support your dog's immune system. Supports Skin & Coat Condition - Omega-3 fatty acids from linseed oil, help maintain a glossy coat and healthy skin. Seaweed naturally contains iodine, minerals, amino acids and vitamins to help support coat growth and colour. Supports Nervous System - Effective levels of B-complex vitamins help maintain your dog's good temperament. NUTRITIONAL INFORMATION Composition: Maltodextrin, Brewer?s Yeast, Microcrystalline Cellulose, Linseed Oil (1.5%), Seaweed (2.5%), Beef Flavouring, Methyl Sulphonyl Methane, Stearic Acid, Magnesium Stearate, Siberian Ginseng. Additives: Vitamins (per Kg): Ascorbic Acid 19802mg, Vitamin E 2970mg, Niacin 5941mg, Thiamine Mononitrate 2970mg, Vitamin A 297mg, Vitamin D3 5mg, Pyridoxine Hydrochloride 1980mg, Pantothenic Acid 1980mg, Riboflavin 1188mg, Cyanocobalamin 3mg, Folic Acid 79mg, D-Biotin 50mg Trace Elements (per Kg): Magnesium Sulphate 19802mg, DL-Methionine 24752mg, L-Lysine Monohydrochloride 14852mg, Ferrous 2475mg, Zinc Oxide 2970mg, L-Carnitine-L-Tartrate 1980mg, Cupric Sulphate 198mg, Manganese Sulphate 139mg, Sodium Selenite 19.8mg Anticaking Agent: Silicon Dioxide Analytical Constituents: Ash 12.91%, Crude Fibre 7.3%, Protein 15.1%, Fat Content 8.2% ADMINISTRATION: If required, break tablets up and mix with food. Do not give more than the recommended intake. Not suitable for puppies under the age of 12 months. The benefits of the ingredients in SuperDog are thought to build over time. A regular intake is therefore recommended. Small dogs (5-21kg): 1 tablet per day Medium dogs (22-33kg): 1-2 tablets per day Large dogs (34-45kg): 2-3 tablets per day
